text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having successfully cast her ultimate racing
magic, Sweep Tosho decides she doesn't need to
run anymore. Instead, she starts studying a
completely different kind of magic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, after recovering from an injury, a
certain Umamusume from the Triple Tiara tour
supposedly distances herself from racing after a
fateful practice run with Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out the real reason is that she fell into
despair after comparing herself to the racers
competing at the Takarazuka Kinen. According to
her, anyone who gets injured and takes time off
gets left behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is outraged at her for accepting
"the way things are" and makes a heated vow to
cast some magic on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set her next goal as the autumn Tenno Sho,
and ask her special rival, Zenno Rob Roy, to enter
the race too.
